name: Rum Raisin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash bananas to make 1 cup. Mix with milk.
2. Cream sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs until blended.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and allspice.
5. Beat 1/3 of the flour mixture into the egg mixture until blended.
6. Beat in half of the banana mixture until blended.
7. Repeat with remaining ingredients, ending with flour mixture.
8. Beat in rum until well blended; stir in raisins.
9. Pour batter into a 10-inch well-greased, fluted tube pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Invert onto a wire rack to cool. Dust with confectioner's sugar.
For flavor variation, replace rum with 3/4 cup orange juice and add 1 tablespoon grated orange rind to the batter.
